---
title: "Workshops"
---

## Workshops & Short Courses

<!-- Add workshops here. Example format:

### Introduction to Item Response Theory with R
**Venue**: Sociedad Chilena de Psicología del Trabajo y las Organizaciones · 2025

A hands-on workshop introducing the basics of IRT using the `mirt` package in R. Covers Rasch models, graded response models, and practical interpretation of item and person parameters.

[Materials](teaching/workshops/irt-intro/)

-->

*Workshops and short courses will be listed here as they are developed. Topics will include IRT, SEM, psychometric analysis, and quantitative research methods.*

---

::: {.callout-note}
## Interested in a Workshop?
If you are interested in organizing a workshop on psychometrics, IRT, SEM, or quantitative methods for your institution or research group, feel free to [contact me](contact.qmd).
:::
